session_summary: Implemented LPC Full Library Import epic: schema expansion, JSON-driven bulk importer, runtime integration, character creator enhancement, asset validator
done: Phase 1A: Expanded BodyPartSlot enum to 17 values (added Shadow, Eyes, Beard, Shoulders, Cape, Feet, Gloves, Hat, Accessories, Shield)
Phase 1A: Added TintCategory enum and bodyTypeTag field to BodyPartData
Phase 1B: Refactored CharacterAppearanceConfig from 7 explicit fields to dictionary-based storage with FormerlySerializedAs migration
Phase 1B: Added Clone(), GetAllParts(), GetTintForCategory(), backward-compat property accessors
Phase 1C: Refactored PlayerAppearance and UILayeredSpritePreview to loop-based ApplyConfig using TintCategory
Phase 1D: Expanded CharacterAppearanceSaveData with slotPartIds dict, bodyType, and MigrateFromV6()
Phase 1D: Bumped SaveManager version 6->7 with migration logic
Phase 1D: Added GetPartsForSlot(slot, bodyType) overload to BodyPartRegistry
Phase 2: Built LPCBulkImporter editor window with JSON manifest discovery, license filtering, batch download, slicing, asset creation
Phase 4: Added exclusiveGroup to BodyPartData with auto-clear in PlayerAppearance.SetPart
Phase 5B: Enhanced CharacterCreationController with body type toggle and generic slot cycling
Phase 6: Created LpcAssetValidator editor tool with 7 validation checks
remaining: Phase 3: Add new animation states to AnimationStateFrameMap (Climb, Sit, Emote, CombatIdle, BackSlash, HalfSlash, Bow) - requires Animator Controller changes
Phase 5B: Build runtime slot tab UI elements in character creator (currently has serialized fields ready but no auto-generated tab bar)
Run the LPC Bulk Importer in Unity Editor to actually download and import the full library
Set exclusiveGroup='head_cover' on Hat and Hair BodyPartData assets after import
Set tintCategory on existing 37 BodyPartData assets (currently TintCategory.None)
decisions: Used serialized BodyPartEntry[] array instead of Dictionary for CharacterAppearanceConfig because Unity can't serialize Dictionary - runtime dict built on demand
Kept backward-compat property accessors (config.body, config.hair, etc.) to avoid breaking LPCSetupWizard and CharacterCreationController
License filter: per-credit-entry check - each credit must have at least one safe license (CC0, OGA-BY, CC-BY non-SA). Multi-licensed assets safe if any license is safe
Body type filter: only import 'male' and 'female' variants, skip muscular/pregnant/teen/child
Deferred Phase 3 (Animator Controller changes) - requires Unity Editor interaction to add animation states
next_steps: Run LPC Bulk Importer in Unity: Tools > LPC Bulk Importer > Run All Steps
Run LPC Asset Validator to verify imported assets: Tools > LPC Asset Validator
Add animation states to Player.controller for Climb, Sit, Emote, CombatIdle, BackSlash, HalfSlash, Bow
Update LPCBulkImporter.LoadOrCreateFrameMap() with expanded animation entries
Set tintCategory on existing 37 BodyPartData assets via editor script or manually
Wire new UI fields (bodyTypeMaleButton, slotTabContainer, etc.) in MainMenu scene Inspector
Test save migration: load v6 save, verify appearance loads correctly in v7
